# Contributing

Thanks for your interest in contributing!

## Workflow

- The default branch is protected: **all changes go through a pull request** — direct pushes are blocked.
- A PR needs **one approving review** and passing CI before it can merge.
- PRs are **squash-merged**; keep your branch focused.
- Run the project's checks locally before pushing (see `.github/workflows/` and the `package.json` scripts).

## Reporting

- Use the issue templates. For security issues, see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).
- Questions? Start a [Discussion](https://github.com/nitekeeper/web-harvester/discussions).

## Code of Conduct

This project follows the [Contributor Covenant](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
